meta.name: Joseph Ribkoff Inspection Report Review – Rules Reference

checkpoints.requirement: Inspection site address — report header / Factory Review checklist — Verify the full factory address is written in English and includes street, building, floor, city, province/state, country, and postal code. Address must not contain Chinese characters.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the address field only
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the address field only

checkpoints.requirement: Is the factory/workshop location same as booked? — Factory Review checklist — Confirm the on-site factory address matches the address recorded in the booking. If they differ, a clear remark must be added to the Inspector's Remark / Other Remarks section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check factory address against booking details
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check factory address against booking details

checkpoints.requirement: Inspector's Remark — report header summary — Verify that a complete list of all defects found is provided, broken down by PO number, with a structured format: "PO xxx: X pcs defect found / Total: X% defect found." If large quantities of defective units are found in the bulk, this must be clearly explained at the beginning of this section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check defect list in remarks against defect details in the Workmanship section
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check defect list in remarks against defect details in the Workmanship section

check_block.check: extract("Does the inspector remark list defects broken down by PO number and include a total defect percentage? Quote the sentence or null if absent.")

checkpoints.requirement: Available Quantity Check — Quantity & Packaging checklist — Verify production status thresholds are met before proceeding with inspection. For PSI: finished quantity must be 100% AND packed quantity must be ≥ 80% to proceed. For DUPRO: both finished and packed quantities must be > 20% to proceed. If thresholds are not met, inform Quality and issue a missing inspection report.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the quantity fields in the Available Quantity Check section
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the quantity fields in the Available Quantity Check section

checkpoints.requirement: Available Quantity Details table — Quantity & Packaging checklist — Verify that any discrepancy between the booking quantity and the on-site quantity (shortage or overage) is clearly noted in the report with an explanation.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check ordered quantity against produced and packed quantities
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check ordered quantity against produced and packed quantities

check_block.check: extract("Quote the sentence explaining the quantity shortage or overage vs booking, or null if absent.")

checkpoints.requirement: Summary review — end of report — For any "No" response recorded anywhere in the Inspection Details fields, a corresponding explanation must be present in the Summary Review section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check all "No" responses throughout the report against the Summary Review section
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check all "No" responses throughout the report against the Summary Review section

check_block.check: extract("For every 'No' answer recorded in inspection details, is there a matching explanation in the summary review or global remark? Answer true only if all are explained.")

checkpoints.requirement: PO ref and SKU — report header, care label, hangtag, carton marking — Confirm that the style number and PO number on the on-site product identification (care label header, barcode hangtag, shipping carton) exactly match the booking information. If they do not match, the service must be treated as failed, a missed inspection report issued, and the reason clearly stated.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check booking style number and PO number against care label, hangtag, and carton markings
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check booking style number and PO number against care label, hangtag, and carton markings

checkpoints.requirement: Color code / description — General Information and product identification labels — If the color code or description on site does not match the booking, proceed with the inspection. Record the actual color(s) and quantity breakdown in the report with a remark identifying the discrepancy.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check booking color information against on-site labels and hangtags
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check booking color information against on-site labels and hangtags

checkpoints.requirement: Lot number — hangtag vs. carton marking — Verify that the lot number on the hangtag matches the lot number on the shipping carton. If they do not match, mark this as Failed and add a remark.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check lot number across hangtag and carton within the Specifications section
checkpoints.context: SECTION — cross-check lot number across hangtag and carton within the Specifications section

check_block.check: extract("Do the lot numbers on hangtags match the lot numbers on shipping cartons? Answer true only if they match or a clear discrepancy remark is present.")

checkpoints.requirement: Are the QIMA documents signed? — Factory Review checklist — Confirm that the Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report, and COC are all signed by both the inspector and the factory representative. Photos of all signed documents must be included in the report.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the signed documents field and verify photos are present
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the signed documents field and verify photos are present

checkpoints.requirement: Random carton selection — Product Specifications checklist — Confirm that cartons were selected fully randomly. If random selection was not possible, the result must be marked as Failed.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the random carton selection result field
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the random carton selection result field

checkpoints.requirement: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks — Product Specifications checklist — Verify the carton side reads "Made in China / Fabrique en Chine." If the wording is incorrect (e.g., "Fait en Chine"), record a MINOR defect remark but do not fail this section. Misspellings of color and country of origin on the carton are also MINOR defects requiring a remark but not a failure.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the outer packing field and any associated remarks
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the outer packing field and any associated remarks

checkpoints.requirement: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Verify that photos of (1) cartons stacked on pallets, (2) carton seals, and (3) labelling on the side of boxes are included in the report under the Specifications section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check that the 3 required photo types are present in the Specifications section
checkpoints.context: SECTION — check that the 3 required photo types are present in the Specifications section

checkpoints.requirement: Inner Packing & Unit Packing — Product Specifications checklist — Verify availability of mold prevention unit (anti-mold sheet or desiccant pack) and vent hole as specified in the tech pack. All products must have anti-mold sheets or desiccant packs.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the inner packing checkpoint result and comments
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the inner packing checkpoint result and comments

checkpoints.requirement: Match packing info — Product Specifications checklist — Verify that the PO number, item/style number, and product description on the product identification inside the carton match the information on the corresponding export carton marking.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check inner product ID against outer carton marking
checkpoints.context: SECTION — cross-check inner product ID against outer carton marking

checkpoints.requirement: Carton drop test — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Photos of the carton drop test must NOT be included in the report unless the test fails. Only a failure requires photos.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the photo content for the carton drop test checkpoint
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the photo content for the carton drop test checkpoint

checkpoints.requirement: Outer Packing: Assortment, Dimensions & Weight — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Photos of measuring the boxes (tape measure applied to carton sides or weight scale reading) must NOT be included in the report. Only the dimensions/weight results table and carton overview photos are required.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the photo content for this checkpoint
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the photo content for this checkpoint

checkpoints.requirement: Folding method — Inspector's Remark / Other Remarks — If the folding method on site differs from the tech pack specification, record this in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section for this reason.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check folding method against tech pack and note in remarks if different
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check folding method against tech pack and note in remarks if different

checkpoints.requirement: Swift attaches — serial tags / Inspector's Remark — Swift attaches for serial tags must be black. If they are clear/transparent, record this as a MINOR defect in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the swift attach color on serial tags
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the swift attach color on serial tags

checkpoints.requirement: Joker tags — denim pants only / Inspector's Remark — For denim pants, joker tags must be sewn on with thread. If attached with black plastic swift attaches instead, record this as a MINOR defect in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check joker tag attachment method on denim pants only
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check joker tag attachment method on denim pants only

checkpoints.requirement: Product Labels — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Verify that all hang tags and care labels are photographed together and grouped in the Product Labels section of the report. Do not scatter label photos across different sections.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check that all label types (main label, care label, hangtags) are present together in the same section
checkpoints.context: SECTION — check that all label types (main label, care label, hangtags) are present together in the same section

checkpoints.requirement: Product Labels — style number, PO, color, lot number consistency — Verify that the style number, PO number, color(s), and lot number are visible and consistent across: (1) the care and content label header (style number and PO number only), (2) the serial barcode hangtag (style number, color(s), PO number, lot number), and (3) the shipping carton marking (style number, color(s), sizes, PO number, lot number).
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check booking information against all 3 product identification components
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check booking information against all 3 product identification components

checkpoints.requirement: Product Logo — Product Specifications checklist — Carefully check the physical product for the brand logo, including on sewn-on trims and interior labels. Do not mark as N/A or "no product logo" without a thorough check of all surfaces and trims.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the Product Logo result field and associated photos
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the Product Logo result field and associated photos

checkpoints.requirement: Product Labels — brand logo comparison vs. approval sample — If there is any visual variation or damage to the brand logo label between the approval sample and the bulk, the report must be marked FAIL. Brand logo variation is a CRITICAL defect.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check brand logo label between approval sample and bulk
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check brand logo label between approval sample and bulk

checkpoints.requirement: Size tab — Product Specifications checklist — If there is any visual variation between the approval sample size tab and the production size tab, the report must be marked FAIL. Size tab variation is a MAJOR defect.
checkpoints.scope_detail: compare bulk size tab against approval sample within the Specifications section
checkpoints.context: SECTION — compare bulk size tab against approval sample within the Specifications section

checkpoints.requirement: Care content label — language sequence — Misprinting or variation in the sequence of languages on care content labels compared to the approval sample is NOT a reason to fail the report.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the care label language sequence against approval sample
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the care label language sequence against approval sample

checkpoints.requirement: Hangers — Product Specifications checklist (when applicable) — If the lot is to be shipped on hangers, verify that hangers bear the Joseph Ribkoff logo as specified in the tech pack.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check hanger specification against tech pack when shipping on hangers is required
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check hanger specification against tech pack when shipping on hangers is required

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Classify untrimmed thread ends by length using the photo as evidence.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity assigned to each untrimmed thread defect entry
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity assigned to each untrimmed thread defect entry

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — All dirt and stain defects must be classified as MAJOR, regardless of size or location.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity assigned to any dirt/stain defect entry
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity assigned to any dirt/stain defect entry

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — All stitching defects must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity assigned to any stitching defect entry
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity assigned to any stitching defect entry

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Yarn defects and holes must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity assigned to any yarn defect or hole entry
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity assigned to any yarn defect or hole entry

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Wrinkles, over-press marks, or creases visible from 1 meter away must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity of any wrinkle or press mark defect entry
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity of any wrinkle or press mark defect entry

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Any seam with excessive puckering, poor tension, or linking that causes the seam to open must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity assigned to any seam quality defect entry
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity assigned to any seam quality defect entry

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Any product whose shape or form differs from the specifications or approval sample must be classified as a MAJOR workmanship defect.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check product form against approval sample and tech pack
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check product form against approval sample and tech pack

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Any trim that is missing, not installed securely, or falling off must be classified as MAJOR. Trim placement and installation must conform to the tech pack and/or approval sample.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check trim installation against tech pack and approval sample
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check trim installation against tech pack and approval sample

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section / report photos — Include a maximum of 5 photos per defect type. If the same defect is found on more than 5 units, upload only 5 representative photos and document the total count in the report. For multiple references or colors, include only 1 photo per color.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the number of photos per defect entry in the Workmanship section
checkpoints.context: SECTION — check the number of photos per defect entry in the Workmanship section

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — Product Dimensions SL checklist; Attachments section — Verify that the measurement chart uses the correct Joseph Ribkoff mandatory POM template for the product category (see table below), that the style number in the chart matches the report SKU, and that the attached Excel file is named exactly "Measurement Chart - [style number]" (e.g., "Measurement Chart - 261740.xlsx").
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check SKU in chart against report header; check file name in Attachments
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check SKU in chart against report header; check file name in Attachments

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — measurement chart (Excel attachment) / report result field — All out-of-tolerance measurements must be highlighted in yellow in the Excel file. Apply the tolerance rule as follows: if all out-of-tolerance values are within ±1/8", classify as MINOR — add a remark and do not fail the section. If any tolerance exceeds ±1/8", highlight in yellow with red text — the measurement section must be marked FAIL.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check highlighting in the attached measurement chart and the result field
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check highlighting in the attached measurement chart and the result field

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — header row and content of measurement chart — Verify that (1) no column is left empty, (2) the style number is written in the chart header, (3) top-row bulk measurements are identified by size and/or color, and (4) no typo errors exist (e.g., letters entered in numeric result cells).
checkpoints.scope_detail: check chart structure and content for completeness and accuracy
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check chart structure and content for completeness and accuracy

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — checklist photos and attachments — Measurement chart screenshots (print screen of POM) and the Excel file must both be uploaded exclusively in the Product Dimensions Result section. Product weight photos must NOT appear in this section. The print screen must be legible and not blurry.
checkpoints.scope_detail: confirm measurement content is only in the Product Dimensions section, weight photos are absent, and print screen is readable
checkpoints.context: SECTION — confirm measurement content is only in the Product Dimensions section, weight photos are absent, and print screen is readable

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions — total sample size (denim category only) — For denim products, 20 units must be measured (effective September 10, 2021), using sampling level S4 or Level 1 based on booking quantity.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check total units measured for denim products
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check total units measured for denim products

checkpoints.requirement: Tests checklist — all test checkpoints / report photos — Include only 1 photo per test in the checklist. For failed tests, provide only 1 photo per failure. Do not upload multiple photos for the same test.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the number of photos per test checkpoint
checkpoints.context: SECTION — check the number of photos per test checkpoint

checkpoints.requirement: Stitch density check — Tests checklist / report photos — The stitch count per inch must be clearly stated as a numeric value in the report, with a supporting photo taken from a seam assembly — not from sewing on the main label.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the stitch density result and photo source
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the stitch density result and photo source

checkpoints.requirement: Ironing, washing, treatment check — Tests checklist / report photos — Include clear photos of both the approval sample and the bulk product side by side, each with a caption identifying which is which.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check that both approval and bulk sample photos are present and labeled
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check that both approval and bulk sample photos are present and labeled

checkpoints.requirement: Barcode scanning test — Tests checklist / report photos — The UPC 13 scanner must be used (not UPC 12). Upload 1 photo per barcode type present on the product. If a barcode scan result is missing a leading zero, record this as a remark but do not fail this section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the barcode type used, the photo count per barcode type, and the interpretation of results
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the barcode type used, the photo count per barcode type, and the interpretation of results

checkpoints.requirement: Symmetry check — Tests checklist / report photos — A verification of the front facing must be done and must be visible in the report. Fold the product on its symmetry axis or use a measurement tool to compare. The result and a supporting photo must be present.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the symmetry check result and supporting photo
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the symmetry check result and supporting photo

checkpoints.requirement: Denim pants — leg twisting / fit model — If leg twisting is identified during inspection of denim pants, the pants must be fitted on a fit model to validate the finding. Clear front and back view photos must be taken on the fit model and uploaded.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check whether a fit model was used when leg twisting was identified
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check whether a fit model was used when leg twisting was identified

checkpoints.requirement: Tests checklist — fit model photos (all products) — Samples must be tried on a fit model and photos provided in the report.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check that fit model photos are present for the product inspected
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check that fit model photos are present for the product inspected

checkpoints.requirement: Approval Sample Comparison — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Each approval sample comparison photo must show the on-site bulk product and the approval sample physically side by side. Each photo must have a caption explicitly identifying which item is the approval sample. The approval sample is identified by a green "QIMA SAMPLE" tag; if the tag is missing, note this in the Other Remarks section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check all approval sample comparison photos in the Specifications section
checkpoints.context: SECTION — check all approval sample comparison photos in the Specifications section

checkpoints.requirement: Starting pictures — report photo section — Verify that a starting photo is present showing the inspector standing in front of the factory logo or name (factory identifier clearly visible).
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the Starting Pictures section
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the Starting Pictures section

checkpoints.requirement: All checklist sections — report photos throughout — Exactly 1 photo per checkpoint is required. Duplicate photos must not appear in the report. General factory environment photos (exterior, inspector walking around) must not be added.
checkpoints.scope_detail: review all photo placements and counts throughout the report
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — review all photo placements and counts throughout the report

checkpoints.requirement: All photos — report-wide — All photos must have captions describing what they show. A photo without a caption is a reportable issue.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check that every photo in the report is accompanied by a caption
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — check that every photo in the report is accompanied by a caption

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — report photos and attachments — Measurement chart screenshots and the Excel file must be uploaded only in the Product Dimensions Result section. Verify these materials do not appear in any other section of the report.
checkpoints.scope_detail: confirm measurement chart content appears only in the Product Dimensions Result section
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — confirm measurement chart content appears only in the Product Dimensions Result section

checkpoints.requirement: Workmanship sampling standards — Workmanship section header — Verify the workmanship inspection uses the correct sampling level and AQL values.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check the AQL values displayed in the Workmanship section header against the above
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check the AQL values displayed in the Workmanship section header against the above

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions SL checklist — sampling header — Verify the measurement sampling uses the correct level and AQL.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check measurement sampling level and unit count against the above requirements
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check measurement sampling level and unit count against the above requirements

checkpoints.requirement: Overall result — report header — The overall result must be PASS only if ALL conditions below are met. Any single failing condition must result in a FAIL overall result.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check overall result against all section results and defect counts
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check overall result against all section results and defect counts
